claim: Tier 4.33a verifies the edge-of-chaos mechanism in s16.15 fixed-point using FP_MUL (int64 intermediate, >>15) arithmetic matching the C runtime macro. FP_MUL arithmetic is correct (mean ratio 1.0111, 9/9 within 10%). Key finding: ARM float tanh is accurate enough; the C runtime can use standard math.h tanh rather than a fixed-point approximation. Ready for C runtime implementation.
caveat: Fixed-point reference only; not C runtime implementation, not hardware evidence, not a baseline freeze.
